case_label: Agentic intent surge vs current deployment
key_signal: 74% expect moderate+ agentic use in 2 years vs 23% today; n=3235
control_observation: intent is scaling faster than operating controls

case_label: Governance maturity deficit
key_signal: 21% report mature AI governance model while deployment intent is much higher
control_observation: governance readiness lags deployment programs

case_label: AI use broad but mostly pilots
key_signal: 88% report AI use in at least one function; most still in pilot or experimentation
control_observation: translation from use to scaled operating model remains constrained

case_label: Tool-call concentration in software engineering
key_signal: 998481 sampled tool calls; software engineering near 50%; other domains single-digit share
control_observation: highest-autonomy adoption clusters where verification is easier

case_label: Production agents stay bounded and human-evaluated
key_signal: 20 case studies and 306 practitioners; 68% <=10 steps before human intervention; 74% primarily human evaluation
control_observation: teams manage reliability with bounded workflows and explicit human gates

case_label: Capability horizon grows quickly but external validity uncertain
key_signal: frontier model 50% task horizon around 50 minutes; doubling about every 7 months since 2019
control_observation: capability growth increases autonomy pressure but does not remove control costs

case_label: Novices gain most from AI assistant
key_signal: n=5179; +14% average productivity; +34% for novice or low-skill; minimal impact on experienced workers
control_observation: output increases are heterogeneous and may shift review burden to experienced staff

case_label: Core developers absorb rework burden
key_signal: peripheral contributors gain most; core developers review +6.5%; core original code output -19% after Copilot introduction
control_observation: AI-generated volume increases technical debt and expert maintenance load

case_label: Coordination overhead rises with AI coding assistance
key_signal: project-level contributions +5.9% while coordination time for integration +8%
control_observation: throughput gains can coexist with higher integration friction

case_label: Retry-loop overspend in procurement agent
key_signal: 12 repeated purchases at $399 in 3 minutes; total loss $4788; trigger was retry loop and per-transaction policy checks
control_observation: controls missing: circuit breaker, velocity checks, aggregate limits, state sync

case_label: Prompt injection CVE in production copilot
key_signal: CVE-2025-32711; NVD CVSS 3.1 score 7.5 HIGH; CNA score 9.3 CRITICAL
control_observation: AI command injection enabled network-based information disclosure

case_label: Zero-click exploit chain across trust boundaries
key_signal: EchoLeak achieved zero-click data exfiltration through chained bypasses and no user interaction
control_observation: defense in depth failed across filtering, rendering, and proxy trust boundaries

case_label: Compound failures in autonomous lab agents
key_signal: two-week live lab with persistent memory plus tools produced 11 failure categories and contradictory completion reports
control_observation: autonomy plus tool access creates compositional failure modes

case_label: Enterprise visibility gap for agent actions
key_signal: only 21% of respondents report full visibility into AI agent actions
control_observation: low visibility increases detection latency and governance overhead

case_label: AI Act phased obligations through 2027
key_signal: AI Act entered force 1 Aug 2024; most rules apply 2 Aug 2026; high-risk regulated-product rules extend to 2 Aug 2027
control_observation: compliance workload is time-phased but unavoidable for affected systems

case_label: GPAI Code of Practice as compliance mechanism
key_signal: Code details GPAI provider obligations; drafting involved nearly 1000 stakeholders
control_observation: structured guidance can reduce ambiguity but adds implementation workload

case_label: AI Pact participation signals readiness pressure
key_signal: AI Pact reports 3265 companies and organizations and more than 230 voluntary pledgers
control_observation: peer and regulatory pressure increases governance investment expectations

case_label: NIST RMF Playbook offers control scaffolding
key_signal: Playbook maps Govern, Map, Measure, Manage and is updated through public feedback
control_observation: process guidance reduces implementation ambiguity but does not remove cost burden

case_label: OpenTelemetry GenAI conventions for runtime telemetry
key_signal: GenAI semantic conventions define agent spans, model spans, metrics, and events
control_observation: standardized telemetry improves auditability and anomaly detection coverage

case_label: AgentOps lifecycle formalizes operations work
key_signal: AgentOps model defines monitoring, anomaly detection, root-cause analysis, and resolution
control_observation: operations overhead is a first-order requirement, not optional polish

case_label: Log-based observability benchmark challenge
key_signal: user study reports 79% agreement that nondeterministic flows are a major challenge
control_observation: black-box evaluation is insufficient; runtime analytics must be first class

case_label: Tracing platform seat cost floor
key_signal: LangSmith Plus listed at $39 per seat per month (pricing snapshot)
control_observation: observability spend scales with team size and trace volume

case_label: Evaluation platform monthly cost floor
key_signal: Braintrust paid tier listed at $249 per month (pricing snapshot)
control_observation: evaluation infrastructure imposes fixed monthly overhead before variable usage

case_label: Orchestration platform entry cost baseline
key_signal: Temporal Essentials shown as starting at $100 per month (pricing snapshot)
control_observation: orchestration reliability adds recurring fixed platform costs

case_label: Alternative orchestration baseline
key_signal: Restate Starter shown at $75 per month and Business at $300 per month (pricing snapshot)
control_observation: platform choice changes fixed cost floor but not need for control stack

case_label: High-volume counterexample for Level 3 economics
key_signal: Klarna reports 2.3M conversations in first month, about two-thirds of chats, equivalent work of 700 agents, and estimated $40M profit improvement
control_observation: throughput gain can dominate when per-error cost is low and reversibility is high

case_label: Workflow-first guidance from Anthropic
key_signal: guide distinguishes workflows from agents and states many use cases are solved by optimized single calls plus retrieval
control_observation: designing for simpler bounded workflows reduces unnecessary autonomy tax

case_label: Human-in-the-loop support pattern from OpenAI
key_signal: open examples include support agent pattern where humans accept or reject suggestions
control_observation: human gate pattern provides practical Level 2.5 control baseline
